item.title:

Offaly level with Dublin in the seocnd
item.description:
RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 6min Interesting times in the Leinster Hurling Championship...
Offaly level with Dublin in the seocnd half and Wexford far from convincing against Kildare.
Follow it here... De rte.ie 517
